videos.title: Start with the lifestyle you want - from Professor @CalNewportMedia
videos.summary: This video challenges you to define your ideal lifestyle before diving into the grind of a junior dev role. It’s essential viewing for aligning your career path with your personal principles and long-term well-being.

videos.title: From prompt to a fully working real-time voice app in seconds. 🎙️✨
videos.summary: See how to move from a simple prompt to a functional, real-time voice application in mere seconds. This is a must-watch for any dev wanting to integrate cutting-edge AI features into their stack quickly.

videos.title: Introducing Gemini 3.5 Live Translate
videos.summary: Discover the latest in real-time translation tech that could break down language barriers in your collaborative projects. Staying ahead of these tools is critical for any developer aiming to stay competitive in the global market.

videos.title: #105 | Building Malaysia's Largest Stroke Rehab Network (Janet Yeo)
videos.summary: Get a deep dive into building a major social-impact enterprise right here in Malaysia. It’s an inspiring look at how to scale a business that serves the community—highly relevant for a career-focused Malaysian.

videos.title: #104 | Is The Unity Government Working? | Idris & Leon Jala
videos.summary: Understand the current state of Malaysia's governance and its direct impact on our national economy. This is essential context for anyone interested in Islamic finance and the broader financial health of the nation.

videos.title: The Math Behind Every $100K Business
videos.summary: This video is a goldmine for junior developers and early-career professionals looking to transition from trading time for money to building scalable income streams. By breaking down the specific math required to reach a $100K milestone, Ali provides a clear, actionable roadmap that helps you demystify business growth and start treating your side projects or freelancing gigs as a serious, strategic business.
